changes.old:
{'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?', 'options': [{'id': 'REST', 'title': 'Rest', 'description': 'Heal [green]30% Max HP[/green] HP. Fight some [red]enemies[/red].'}, {'id': 'TRUDGE_ON', 'title': 'Trudge On', 'description': 'Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lose [red]11[/red] HP.'}]}, {'id': 'REST', 'description': "You're dead tired and take a nap...

...only to be awoken by [gold][jitter]something wriggling around[/jitter][/gold] on top of you!", 'options': [{'id': 'FIGHT', 'title': 'Fight!', 'description': ''}]}, {'id': 'TRUDGE_ON', 'description': 'You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on...

You sustain yourself on [green]strange fruits[/green], [orange]crunchy bugs[/orange], and drink the nectar of [aqua]glowing plants[/aqua] but you start feeling [jitter][red]paranoid...[/red][/jitter]

But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some drawings of maps on the ground.
Problem solved.'}

changes.old:
{'id': 'DRINK', 'description': 'You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?', 'options': [{'id': 'DRINK', 'title': 'Drink', 'description': 'Heal [green]33% Max HP[/green] HP.'}, {'id': 'OBSERVE', 'title': 'Observe', 'description': '[gold]Enchant[/gold] a [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] with [purple]Spiral[/purple].'}, {'id': 'REACH_IN', 'title': 'Reach In', 'description': 'Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].'}]}, {'id': 'OBSERVE', 'description': "[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]"}, {'id': 'REACH_IN', 'description': 'Foolishly, you plunge your arm into the center of the [aqua][sine]Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua], disrupting the equilibrium. The water becomes [blue][jitter]frigid[/jitter][/blue] and grasps you, carving [jitter][red]Invisible Spirals[/red][/jitter] into your arm.

Your fingers brush against something solid, and you grasp around in pain to finally wrestle a [gold]Relic[/gold] out of there!'}

[gold]3.[/gold] A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
[gold]4.[/gold] Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
[gold]5.[/gold] The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup.

[green][sine]“Tea is served.”[/sine][/green]'}, {'id': 'INITIAL', 'description': 'You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.
